answer: Normal turnaround time is within one business day or sooner. If you haven't received a confirmation email, please check your spam folder or contact us at admin@2ctmedia.com

question: Will you sell directly to my customer?
answer: We sell wholesale ONLY. We will never sell direct to your customer. Our commitment is to help you grow your business and offer YOU the lowest cost and deliver the highest quality products.

question: Can I see pricing before account approval?
answer: In order to access our online pricing, you must first receive account approval. We do not sell directly to the public. You must be a trade member (sign shop, print shop, etc). You can become a registered reseller by clicking (Get Started) on the home page.
answer_html: In order to access our online pricing, you must first receive account approval. We do not sell directly to the public. You must be a trade member (sign shop, print shop, etc). You can become a registered reseller by clicking (Get Started) on the home page.

question: What options are availalbe for product design?
answer: There are three options for designing and customizing a product. Click a product on the left-hand panel and choose one of the options. 1. Custom Design: lets you customize the products. Click it to open the design studio and use multiple tools to create your own design. 2. Upload Design: using this option, you can upload your own JPG, JPEG, GIF, PNG, EPS, AI, PDF and PSD images. 3. Browse Design: use this to select hundreds of pre-loaded templates. Work on them or customize them through our design studio.
answer_html:
There are three options for designing and customizing a product. Click a product on the left-hand panel and choose one of the options.

1. Custom Design: lets you customize the products. Click it to open the design studio and use multiple tools to create your own design.

2. Upload Design: using this option, you can upload your own JPG, JPEG, GIF, PNG, EPS, AI, PDF and PSD images.

3. Browse Design: use this to select hundreds of pre-loaded templates. Work on them or customize them through our design studio.

question: What equipment do you use?
answer: We employ the latest technology for our industry. We are constantly investing in leading-edge technologies providing some of the highest image qualities with maximum efficiency in mind. We have UV-LED, and GelUV ink technologies printing from some of the industries' top printing equipment. Our printers can print up to 1200 x 1200 dpi, and offer special features like Matte Ink, White, and Even Gloss Inks. We have some of the most advanced technology available. We have deployed a Multicam Celero 7 CNC finishing table. Our technology allows for the most accurate finishing at the highest speeds, providing you with a top-quality product rapidly. We are constantly seeking advancements in our equipment portfolio and are testing and reviewing equipment at all times. Our goal is to provide you with the best-curated options in the industry using the best machines available.

question: Can I cancel or change my order after it has been placed?
answer: Once your order has been processed and moved to production, changes or cancellations cannot be guaranteed. Contact support immediately and they will try to halt the order. Cancelled orders may be charged for materials and labor already incurred. There is no cancellation or refund on items already in the production queue or completed.

Cancelled orders may be charged for materials and labor already incurred. There is no cancellation or refund on items already in the production queue or completed.

question: What is the return / refund policy if there is an issue with my order?
answer: Visual Graphx aims for 100% customer satisfaction. If you are unhappy with your order or there is a defect, you must report it within five business days of delivery with a description and pictures. For errors caused by Visual Graphx (defective print, wrong material, etc.) replacement products are sent with priority shipping at no charge, or a refund may be offered at their discretion. For customer-side errors after proof approval (typos, low-resolution images, color mismatch on un-color-matched files) Visual Graphx will work with you to fix the situation, but cost recovery may apply.

If you are unhappy with your order or there is a defect, you must report it within five business days of delivery with a description and pictures. For customer-side errors after proof approval (typos, low-resolution images, color mismatch on un-color-matched files) Visual Graphx will work with you to fix the situation, but cost recovery may apply.

question: What does "general performance" vs "high performance" vinyl mean?
answer: General-performance (standard) vinyl is a durable, scratch-resistant film suited to most indoor and short/medium-term outdoor use. High-performance vinyl is engineered for longer outdoor durability, conformability over rivets and contours, and resistance to harsh weather - typically used for vehicle wraps and long-term outdoor signage.
answer_html: General-performance (standard) vinyl is a durable, scratch-resistant film suited to most indoor and short/medium-term outdoor use. High-performance vinyl is engineered for longer outdoor durability, conformability over rivets and contours, and resistance to harsh weather - typically used for vehicle wraps and long-term outdoor signage.
